name: Jirou Awasaka
description: Jirou Awasaka is a minor antagonist in the Jujutsu Kaisen series. He is a curse user who used to kill and collect money as much as he pleased until [Satoru Gojou](https://anilist.co/character/127691/Satoru-Gojou) was born. ~!He was recruited for the Shibuya Incident by [Kenjaku](https://anilist.co/character/289584/Kenjaku) and Uraume to guard a set of commissioned curtains and kill jujutsu sorcerers.!~
